name: Traveling Guide Curly
author: Poki
description: Traveling Guide Curly is a dress-up game created by Idea Studios. Join Curly on her next adventure and discover exciting countries to travel to. Help her to choose the best outfits with which to visit the different cities, and remember to take a souvenir photo. Paris, Japan, Aspen... which will be your next destination? How to play? Use your mouse cursor to select. Who is the developer? Traveling Guide Curly is created by Idea Studios. Play some other of their games such as just-married-home-deco or ollie-goes-to-school on Poki!
